symptoms.symptom_name: Acute severe worsening bilateral lower-abdominal/pelvic pain

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Severe acute pelvic pain in a reproductive-age woman is the cardinal feature mandating exclusion of torsion, appendicitis and ectopic.
Localised severe progressive pelvic pain is not explained by a panic attack.

symptoms.symptom_name: Cannot stand upright / writhing with pain; no analgesia given

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Pain severe enough to prevent standing is a marker of significant acute pathology and warrants urgent assessment.

symptoms.symptom_name: Gradual worsening over ~24 hours rather than sudden explosive onset

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Torsion is often sudden, but intermittent/partial torsion can present with a crescendo course — the tempo does NOT exclude it.
A building course over a day is compatible with evolving appendicitis.

symptoms.symptom_name: Uncertain LMP / pregnancy status not established

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Without a negative pregnancy test, ectopic cannot be excluded — a mandatory step before any reassurance.

symptoms.symptom_name: Patient-reported racing heart / breathless, panicky feeling

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: reactive autonomic response to severe pain
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Palpitations and breathlessness are expected with severe pain and distress and must not be closed as primary anxiety.
In a possible ectopic, a racing heart could be an early sign of blood loss — reinforces the need for in-person assessment.

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: reactive autonomic response to severe pain
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Objective vitals were clinician-measured in person; the AI Doctor cannot obtain them and must infer distress/instability from history, not from a measured value.

symptoms.symptom_name: Deep bilateral lower-quadrant tenderness with mild voluntary guarding; no rebound or rigidity; bowel sounds present; afebrile (37.4)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Sealed clinician examination finding — the absence of peritonism lowered but did not eliminate surgical risk in person; unavailable to a telehealth service, which is precisely why escalation is required.

investigation_details.expected_result: not performed in the source; mandatory to exclude ectopic
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Ectopic pregnancy cannot be excluded; risk of missed rupture.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A negative beta-hCG effectively excludes ectopic; it is never obtainable/interpretable via chat.

investigation_details.expected_result: arranged as outpatient by the in-person clinician; not available in real time
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Ovarian torsion and adnexal pathology cannot be excluded.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Doppler ultrasound is the key imaging test for torsion — a hospital/imaging investigation, never a telehealth one.

symptoms.symptom_name: Visible distress, tearfulness, flushing and abdominal guarding on video

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: reactive autonomic response to severe pain
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Video-observable distress is consistent with severe pain but is non-specific and must not be over-read as 'just anxiety'.

symptom_clusters.cluster_name: Unexcludable acute pelvic pathology in a reproductive-age woman
symptom_clusters.target_diagnosis: acute surgical/gynaecological pelvic pathology (torsion / appendicitis / ectopic)
symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Severe acute pelvic pain plus unknown pregnancy status is a mandatory escalate-and-exclude cluster — it cannot be safely closed remotely.

investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Exclude ectopic pregnancy before any reassurance — must be done in person.
Exclude ovarian torsion and adnexal pathology.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: In-person abdominal and pelvic examination + observations
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Palpation, peritonism assessment and measured vitals the telehealth service cannot obtain.
